TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Taitung, title = Taitung, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taitung} }

S.FORM: == Taitung == Itini i Taitung ko Taitung. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 111.48 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 0.47 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 1.09 km²), 10,692 ko tamdaw i Taitung, 3,655 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 6,817 a tamdaw, pakaala to 64%(Amis, Puyuma, Paiwan) no polong no tamdaw. o Amis, Puyuma, Paiwan ko sa'alomanay i Taitung Cen/ Siyang. O kasaniyarona 46 ko cun, 20 ko niyaro' i Taitung. Apapuro , Pasawali , Ining , Falangaw , Asiroay , Pusong , Alapanay , Karoroan , Matang , Katatipul , Kasavakan , Puyuma , Papulu , Kalaluran , Fukid , Pongodan , Sihodingan , Kakawasan , Siafulungay , Pakurung .
S.PHON: == taito~u~uŋ == itini i taito~u~uŋ ko~u taito~u~uŋ. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u ***.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u *.** km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u *.** km*), **,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i taito~u~uŋ, *,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u *,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(amis, po~u~ujo~u~uma, paiwan) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u amis, po~u~ujo~u~uma, paiwan ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i taito~u~uŋ ʦən/ sijaŋ. o~u kasanijaro~una ** ko~u ʦo~u~un, ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ i taito~u~uŋ. apapo~u~uro~u , pasawaɾi , iniŋ , faɾaŋaw , asiro~uaj , po~u~uso~uŋ , aɾapanaj , karo~uro~uan , mataŋ , katatipo~u~uɾ , kasab~vakan , po~u~ujo~u~uma , papo~u~uɾo~u~u , kaɾaɾo~u~uran , fo~u~ukiɬ~ɮ , po~uŋo~uɬ~ɮan , siħo~uɬ~ɮiŋan , kakawasan , siafo~u~uɾo~u~uŋaj , pako~u~uro~u~uŋ .
S.FORM: == Taitung == Itini i Taitung ko Taitung. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 111.48 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 0.47 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 1.09 km²), 10,692 ko tamdaw i Taitung, 3,655 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 6,817 a tamdaw, pakaala to 64%(Amis, Puyuma, Paiwan) no polong no tamdaw. o Amis, Puyuma, Paiwan ko sa'alomanay i Taitung Cen/ Siyang. O kasaniyarona 46 ko cun, 20 ko niyaro' i Taitung. Apapuro , Pasawali , Ining , Falangaw , Asiroay , Pusong , Alapanay , Karoroan , Matang , Katatipul , Kasavakan , Puyuma , Papulu , Kalaluran , Fukid , Pongodan , Sihodingan , Kakawasan , Siafulungay , Pakurung .
S.PHON: == taito~u~uŋ == itini i taito~u~uŋ ko~u taito~u~uŋ. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u ***.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u *.** km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u *.** km*), **,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i taito~u~uŋ, *,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u *,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(amis, po~u~ujo~u~uma, paiwan) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u amis, po~u~ujo~u~uma, paiwan ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i taito~u~uŋ ʦən/ sijaŋ. o~u kasanijaro~una ** ko~u ʦo~u~un, ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ i taito~u~uŋ. apapo~u~uro~u , pasawaɾi , iniŋ , faɾaŋaw , asiro~uaj , po~u~uso~uŋ , aɾapanaj , karo~uro~uan , mataŋ , katatipo~u~uɾ , kasab~vakan , po~u~ujo~u~uma , papo~u~uɾo~u~u , kaɾaɾo~u~uran , fo~u~ukiɬ~ɮ , po~uŋo~uɬ~ɮan , siħo~uɬ~ɮiŋan , kakawasan , siafo~u~uɾo~u~uŋaj , pako~u~uro~u~uŋ .
